title: FAS-1 Resolution Response
description: The response returned when resolving a pay: alias via GET /v1/resolve/{alias}. Contains entity info, ranked payment endpoints, ISO 20022 hints, and compliance signals.

resolution_id.description: Unique identifier for this resolution event. Maps to EndToEndId in downstream ISO 20022 messages.

alias.description: The pay: URI that was resolved (e.g., 'pay:vendor.alpha').

resolved.description: True if the alias is active and has at least one valid endpoint.

resolution_status.description: Granular resolution outcome. 'resolved' = full success, 'partial' = some endpoints unavailable, 'failed' = alias not found or blocked.

resolved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this resolution was performed.

resolved_from.description: Whether this response was served from the origin database or from cache. Also returned as the X-Resolved-From HTTP header.

ttl_seconds.description: How long this resolution is valid for caching, in seconds. Re-resolve after TTL expiry.

caller_tier.description: The caller's auth tier, which determines field visibility. 0 = public (most redacted), 3 = full access (no redaction).

entity.description: Information about the entity that owns this alias.

display_name.description: Human-readable name of the alias owner (e.g., 'Alpha Vendors LLC').

entity_type.description: The namespace category this alias belongs to.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the entity's jurisdiction (e.g., 'US').

tier.description: Registration tier. Founding = first 500 names at 5 XRP.

endpoints.description: Ranked list of payment endpoints. Ordered by priority (1 = highest).

rail.description: The payment rail for this endpoint.

fee_estimate.description: Estimated fee for using this endpoint (e.g., '0.045').

routing_metadata.description: Rail-specific routing details. Redacted at lower caller tiers.

account_number.description: Bank account number (ACH/FedNow). Redacted at tier < 3.

compliance.description: Compliance screening status for this alias.

status.description: 'clear' = no sanctions hit, 'pending' = screening in progress, 'blocked' = OFAC/sanctions match.

screened_at.description: When the last compliance screening was performed.

travel_rule_required.description: True if payments to this alias exceed Travel Rule thresholds.

iso20022_hint.description: ISO 20022 message construction hints for the preferred rail.

identity.description: On-chain identity block. Present at tier 3 for aliases with minted NFT identities.

nft_token_id.description: XLS-20 NFT token ID on XRPL mainnet.

image_uri.description: IPFS URI for the generative identity image (ipfs://Qm...).

metadata_uri.description: IPFS URI for NFT metadata JSON (ipfs://Qm...).

image_url.description: HTTPS gateway URL for the identity image.

nft_explorer_url.description: XRPL explorer link for the NFT.

generation.description: Genome generation. Increases with each evolution.

identity_status.description: Current state of the identity pipeline.

agent_commerce.description: AP2 compatibility block for agent-to-agent commerce. Present when the alias owner has registered agent capabilities.

payment_alias.description: The pay: alias bound to this agent.

rail_score.description: Deterministic scoring breakdown for each available rail. Present at tier 3.

cache_hit.description: Whether this resolution was served from cache.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings about this resolution (e.g., stale compliance data, degraded rail).

error_code.description: Present only when resolved=false. Indicates why resolution failed.
